nasb.text: Then Hezekiah and all the people rejoiced over what God had prepared for the people, because the thing came about suddenly.

esv.text: And Hezekiah and all the people rejoiced because God had provided for the people, for the thing came about suddenly.

cnv.text: 因為事情很快辦完，希西家和全體人民因　神為他的子民所預備的，都甚歡樂。

ccb.text: 希西迦和民众因上帝为他们所做的而欢喜快乐，因为这事情很快成就了。
